title: IOContract
description: Minimal mapping contract from a business system's raw input/output to Full Spectrum governance objects via a Business Adapter.

adapter_id.description: Identifier of the Business Adapter (e.g. ecommerce, logistics).

raw_input_schema.description: Declared shape of the business raw input.

to_governance_event.description: Mapping from raw input to a Governance Event.

to_canonical_context.description: Mapping that produces a Canonical Context.

governance_output_envelope.description: Expected engine output object (Governance Output Envelope).

report.description: Human-readable Markdown report template or reference.
